title: Universal Scalping & Day Trading Playbook
style: Quick trades, many trades - high frequency with strict process

scalping_system.definition: Trades lasting 1-15 minutes, fixed targets, executed only at pre-marked zones during the instrument's active window (synthetics: any time).
pre_session_checklist: Mark H1 trend direction and the 2-3 nearest H1 zones
Mark session-relevant liquidity: Asian range, PDH/PDL, equal highs/lows
Write down: instruments, max trades, daily loss cap - BEFORE the first trade
entry_requirements_all_must_be_true: Price is AT a pre-marked zone (never mid-air entries)
Trade direction agrees with M15 structure (or a confirmed range)
Candle trigger printed and CLOSED (engulfing / pin rejection / inside-bar break)
Momentum agrees (RSI reset in trend, or RSI extreme at range edge)
Spread is normal for the instrument (check before every night trade)

exit_rules.take_profit: Fixed 1:1 to 1:1.5 RR. Scalps are not runners. Bank and reload.
exit_rules.stop_loss: ATR-based (see each instrument file), placed beyond the zone/wick, NEVER moved further away
exit_rules.time_stop: If the trade has not moved in your favor within 10-15 candles of the entry timeframe, exit at market - the setup failed quietly
exit_rules.breakeven: Move SL to entry only after +0.7R on scalps

frequency_control.quality_gate: Every trade must name its setup from the instrument's JSON file. 'It looks like it will go up' is not a setup.

day_trading_system.definition: 1-3 trades per day held 30 minutes to several hours, targeting the day's main expansion leg.
daily_routine: Before London: top-down analysis (H4 -> H1 -> M15) on each instrument, write the day's bias
Define the ONE level per instrument where you would trade, and the trigger you need
If price never reaches the level, there is no trade - a flat day is a winning day
day_trading_system.entry_model: Liquidity sweep INTO your H1 zone -> M15 CHoCH -> entry on the retrace to the M15 breaker/order block

management.trail: Behind M15 swing points; give trends room to breathe
management.hard_exit: H1 structure break against you, or 30 min before major news (fiat), or 22:30 SAST for forex day trades

day_trading_system.targets: PDH/PDL, weekly high/low, measured moves, major round numbers

risk_management.daily_loss_cap: 3% - platform closed for the day when hit
risk_management.weekly_loss_cap: 6% - reduce all sizes 50% the following week
forbidden: Martingale, grid, or doubling after losses (especially on synthetics)
Trading without a stop loss 'just for a second'
Holding forex scalps through red-folder news

accuracy_multipliers.confluence_scoring: Only take trades with 3+ confluences: zone + structure + trigger + momentum + (session timing for fiat). More confluence = larger size within your risk cap.
accuracy_multipliers.weekly_review: Every weekend: win rate per setup per instrument. Cut the bottom setup, double focus on the top one.
accuracy_multipliers.the_edge: Your edge is not prediction - it is taking the same 5-6 setups at the same quality zones hundreds of times with fixed risk.
